data.title: Healthy Extracts Issues Convertible Promissory Note to Labrys
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Healthy Extracts ( (HYEX) ) just unveiled an update.

On July 17, 2026, Healthy Extracts entered into a Securities Purchase Agreement under which it issued a $258,750 promissory note to LABRYS FUND II, L.P. The note carries a 10% annual interest rate earned upfront, includes a $33,750 original issue discount, and delivered net proceeds of $225,000 to the company, with prepayment prohibited without the holder’s consent.

The note is convertible after 180 days at the lesser of $2.00 per share or 75% of the lowest closing bid price over the prior 15 trading days, potentially leading to equity dilution. Beginning January 18, 2027, Healthy Extracts must make six monthly amortization payments of $36,964.28 in principal and interest, unless portions of the note are converted into common stock, affecting the company’s future cash flows and capital structure.

Spark’s Take on HYEX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HYEX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by continued unprofitability and weak technical trends (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). Improving revenue growth, a cleaner recent balance sheet, and modestly positive cash flow provide some support, but recent executive departures add near-term execution uncertainty.

To see Spark’s full report on HYEX stock,
click here.

More about Healthy Extracts

Healthy Extracts operates in the health and wellness sector, focusing on nutritional and supplement-based products. The company’s activities include capital-raising transactions that support its ongoing operations and growth initiatives within this competitive market.

Average Trading Volume: 910

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $15.44M

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Grants Incentive Awards Tied to FDA Approval
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Outlook Therapeutics ( (OTLK) ) has issued an update.

On July 21, 2026, Outlook Therapeutics’ compensation committee granted stock options under its 2024 Equity Incentive Plan to Chief Executive Officer Robert C. Jahr and Chief Financial Officer Lawrence A. Kenyon, covering 100,000 and 210,078 shares, respectively, at an exercise price of $1.4304. These options, which vest on July 21, 2027 contingent on continued service, were awarded in recognition of their efforts in 2025 and 2026 to advance the company’s Biologics License Application for ONS-5010 through U.S. Food and Drug Administration review and appeal processes.

The committee also approved performance-based cash bonus opportunities on July 21, 2026 for Jahr and Kenyon, set at $420,000 and $200,000, that will only be paid if the FDA approves ONS-5010 and issues a favorable decision on the company’s Biologics License Application by July 31, 2026. The structure of these awards underscores Outlook Therapeutics’ focus on securing regulatory approval for ONS-5010 and ties executive compensation closely to this critical milestone for shareholders and the company’s strategic positioning in the ophthalmic biologics market.

The most recent analyst rating on (OTLK) stock is a Hold
with a $1.61 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Outlook Therapeutics stock,
see the OTLK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OTLK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OTLK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (deep losses, negative cash flow, and negative equity). Technicals are supportive due to strong trend strength, but overbought readings raise near-term risk. Corporate events add upside potential from regulatory progress, partially offset by dilution concerns, while valuation is limited by ongoing losses and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on OTLK stock,
click here.

More about Outlook Therapeutics

Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing ophthalmic therapies, including its lead product candidate ONS-5010 (bevacizumab-vikg) for retinal diseases. The company targets the eye-care market by advancing biologic treatments intended to compete in the anti-VEGF segment, subject to regulatory approvals in the U.S. and other jurisdictions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: AXIA Energia Calls Digital EGM to Vote on Power Asset Mergers
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

AXIA Energia ( (AXIA) ) has shared an announcement.

AXIA Energia’s management has called an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) of shareholders for August 28, 2026, to be held exclusively in digital format via the Atlas AGM platform, with the company providing a detailed participation manual covering registration, documentation, and accreditation procedures. The EGM agenda includes management’s proposal for a series of corporate mergers involving entities such as Juno, Tijoá Energia, Retiro Baixo, and NE Janapu, a move that is expected to streamline AXIA Energia’s corporate structure and could influence its operational integration and positioning within Brazil’s power generation industry, with shareholders able to vote remotely via multiple channels including the company, its bookkeeping agent, custody agents, and B3’s central depository.

Spark’s Take on AXIA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AXIA is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong recent margins and meaningful free cash flow) and supportive valuation (moderate P/E and high dividend yield). These positives are tempered by weak technicals, with price below major moving averages and negative momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on AXIA stock,
click here.

More about AXIA Energia

AXIA Energia S.A. is a Brazil-based, category A publicly held energy company headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, with shares listed on the Novo Mercado segment of B3. The company operates in the power generation sector and is regulated under Brazilian corporate and securities laws, reflecting a focus on transparency and access to capital markets.

data.title: Woori Financial Group Posts Strong Q2 2026 Profit Rebound Despite Revenue Decline
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Woori Finance Holdings Co ( (WF) ) has provided an announcement.

Woori Financial Group reported preliminary consolidated results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, showing revenue of KRW 13.17 trillion, down 13.9% from the first quarter and 3.0% year-on-year, but with operating income rising 62.8% quarter-on-quarter and 18.7% from the second quarter of 2025. Net income grew 60.5% from the prior quarter and 9.2% year-on-year to KRW 1.03 trillion, while profit attributable to equity holders of the parent climbed 66.2% sequentially and 7.4% versus a year earlier, indicating stronger profitability despite softer top-line performance.

Woori Bank, the group’s main banking subsidiary, also reported preliminary consolidated figures for the same period, with quarterly revenue falling about 23.4% from the first quarter and 25.0% year-on-year to KRW 9.19 trillion. Nonetheless, operating income surged 63.1% from the prior quarter, and net income jumped 61.5% quarter-on-quarter even as it declined 8.1% from a year earlier, underscoring improved short-term earnings momentum but mixed year-on-year trends; all figures remain subject to adjustment pending auditor review.

The most recent analyst rating on (WF) stock is a Buy
with a $72.26 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Woori Finance Holdings Co stock,
see the WF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WF is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects solid-but-mixed fundamentals: profitability and improved recent cash generation are tempered by a sharp TTM revenue decline and elevated leverage. Technicals are currently weak (below key moving averages with negative MACD), offset by attractive valuation (low P/E and strong dividend yield) and a generally constructive earnings call featuring stronger capital levels and shareholder returns despite notable one-offs and cost/credit headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on WF stock,
click here.

More about Woori Finance Holdings Co

Woori Financial Group Inc., based in Seoul, is a South Korean financial holding company with Woori Bank as its core wholly owned subsidiary. The group operates across banking and broader financial services, generating revenue from interest income, fees and commissions, dividends, insurance income and gains on financial assets under Korean International Financial Reporting Standards.

data.title: USA Rare Earth Seeks Shareholder Approval for SVRE Merger and Major Equity Issuance
data.description:
New activity is brewing for USA Rare Earth ( (USAR) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Double your USAR exposure with Tradr's USAX

USA Rare Earth has called an August 28 virtual special meeting for shareholders to vote on issuing 126.85 million new shares to acquire SVRE Holdings and on a possible adjournment to solicit more proxies. Under the agreed cash-and-stock deal, SVRE securityholders will receive $300 million plus stock and end up with about 34.1% of the enlarged company, while existing USAR investors retain roughly 65.9%.

The board unanimously backs the merger, citing creation of a fully integrated mine‑to‑magnet platform and locking in one of the largest non‑Asian heavy rare earth sources via Brazil’s Pela Ema project. The transaction is contingent on shareholder approval and key government consents, including U.S. and DFC financing structures and a long‑term U.S.-aligned offtake, and carries material risks around valuation, dilution, integration, Brazilian political and regulatory exposure and substantial leverage under SVRE’s DFC facility.

The most recent analyst rating on (USAR) stock is a Buy
with a $30.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on USA Rare Earth stock,
see the USAR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on USAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, USAR is a Neutral.

USAR’s score is held back primarily by deep ongoing losses and weak price momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by a low-leverage balance sheet, recently positive TTM cash flow, and earnings-call signals of significant committed/anticipated funding and defined operational scale-up milestones, albeit with meaningful execution and dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on USAR stock,
click here.

More about USA Rare Earth

USA Rare Earth, Inc. is building a fully integrated rare earths and permanent magnet value chain across the U.S., U.K., France and Brazil. Through assets including Less Common Metals, a Stillwater, Oklahoma magnet plant, the Round Top deposit in Texas and, post‑merger, the Pela Ema mine in Brazil, it aims to provide a secure Western supply of materials for aerospace, defense, semiconductors, energy, data centers, mobility, healthcare and industrial sectors.

SVRE Holdings Ltd. operates one of the largest ionic clay rare earth deposits outside Asia via the Serra Verde Pela Ema mine in Brazil, producing all four critical magnetic elements — neodymium, praseodymium, dysprosium and terbium — plus yttrium. Its Phase I mixed rare earth carbonate output is ramping toward about 6,400 tonnes of TREO annually, with a potential Phase II expansion to double run‑of‑mine production by 2030, supported by a long‑term U.S.-backed offtake and DFC project financing.

Average Trading Volume: 15,317,244

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.87B

The analyst observes that Pacific Gas & Electric Co.’s reliance on a single consolidated segment and a net-income-focused CODM framework may obscure the underlying performance of distinct business activities. This limits transparency into cost drivers and segment-level risks, potentially hampering investors’ ability to assess profitability, capital allocation efficiency, and exposure to specific regulatory or operational shocks.

He notes that because management is not regularly provided with disaggregated segment expense data under ASC 280, the company may be slower to detect emerging margin pressures or operational inefficiencies in particular customer classes or asset groups. This structural opacity in internal and external reporting could contribute to mispricing of risk, weaker strategic responses to adverse developments, and greater earnings volatility over time.
